title: Create: Automate Materials
description: CREATE and automate creating ores, (not eco friendly)
body:
# What is this mod about?

This is a **mod** about adding **new cores**, and **essenses**, also _pretty fine_ **textures**.

## Features:

- Recipes for ores
- Great Textures
- Craftable Diamonds
- Cores
- Deco Blocks


## Note:

This project is **under developement.**

This project is made in **MCreator**

This is a remake of my mod on _CurseForge_
